changes: An issue wherein the action text for the white mage PvP mage action Protect was incorrect has been addressed.

housing.name: Big One Festival Float
housing.description: Outdoor Furnishing. Though this towering vehicle is meant for use in parades celebrating the Big One, a modern Namazu, rather than said venerable ancestor, is depicted atop it.

housing.name: Ananta Metalworks
housing.description: Tabletop. A number of beautifully detailed, opulent golden vessels created in honor of Sri Lakshmi.
